title: Solutions of the Bogomolny Equation on R^3 with Certain Type of Knot   Singularity I
summary:
Moduli space of the Bogomolny equation on R^3 with certain asymptotic
conditions at infinity has been well studied for a long time. This paper
studies the moduli space of solutions to the Bogomolny equation on R^3 with a
knot singularity. The author hopes such kind of moduli spaces have potential
applications in low-dimensional topology and knot theory in the future.

AI.tldr: 研究带结点奇性的Bogomolny方程在R^3上的模空间
AI.motivation: 传统上对无穷远处满足特定渐近条件的Bogomolny方程模空间已有深入研究，本文研究带有结点奇性的情况，旨在探索其在低维拓扑和纽结理论中的潜在应用。
AI.techniques: 模空间理论、Bogomolny方程分析、奇点处理技术、渐近分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 建立了带结点奇性的Bogomolny方程在R^3上的模空间理论框架，描述了其结构性质
AI.significance: 为低维拓扑和纽结理论提供了新的数学工具，扩展了规范场论中模空间理论的应用范围

title: Gradient Bounds and Liouville theorems for Quasi-linear equations on   compact Manifolds with nonnegative Ricci curvature
comment: To appear in Proceedings of AMS
summary:
In this work we establish a gradient bound and Liouville-type theorems for
solutions to Quasi-linear elliptic equations on compact Riemannian Manifolds
with nonnegative Ricci curvature. Also, we provide a local splitting theorem
when the inequality in the gradient bound becomes equality at some point.
Moreover, we prove a Harnack-type inequality and an ABP estimate for the
gradient of solutions in domains contained in the manifold.

AI.tldr: 在Ricci曲率非负的紧致黎曼流形上，建立了拟线性椭圆方程解的梯度估计、Liouville型定理、局部分裂定理、Harnack型不等式和ABP估计。
AI.motivation: 研究Ricci曲率非负的紧致黎曼流形上拟线性椭圆方程解的几何分析性质，包括梯度控制、解的分类（Liouville型定理）、流形结构（分裂定理）以及解的局部正则性估计。
AI.techniques: 使用几何分析技术，包括Bochner公式、极大值原理、比较几何方法（Ricci曲率条件）、Harnack不等式技巧和Alexandrov-Bakelman-Pucci（ABP）估计方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 梯度估计：解梯度的上界估计；2. Liouville型定理：特定条件下只有常数解；3. 局部分裂定理：梯度估计等号成立时流形的局部乘积结构；4. Harnack型不等式：解的梯度比较；5. ABP估计：梯度在区域内的控制。
AI.significance: 将经典椭圆方程理论推广到流形几何背景，建立了曲率条件与解性质的联系，为几何分析中拟线性方程研究提供了新工具，对理解流形几何结构与偏微分方程解的相互作用有重要意义。

title: Interior Schauder estimates for fractional elliptic equations in   nondivergence form
comment: 43 pages. To appear in SIAM Journal on Mathematical Analysis
summary:
We obtain sharp interior Schauder estimates for solutions to nonlocal Poisson
problems driven by fractional powers of nondivergence form elliptic operators
$(-a^{ij}(x) \partial_{ij})^s$, for $0<s<1$, in bounded domains under minimal
regularity assumptions on the coefficients $a^{ij}(x)$. Solutions to the
fractional problem are characterized by a local degenerate/singular extension
problem. We introduce a novel notion of viscosity solutions for the extension
problem and implement Caffarelli's perturbation methodology in the
corresponding degenerate/singular Monge--Amp\`ere geometry to prove Schauder
estimates in the extension. This in turn implies interior Schauder estimates
for solutions to the fractional nonlocal equation. Furthermore, we prove a new
Hopf lemma, the interior Harnack inequality and H\"older regularity in the
Monge--Amp\`ere geometry for viscosity solutions to the extension problem.

AI.tldr: 建立了非散度形式椭圆算子的分数幂驱动的非局部Poisson问题的尖锐内部Schauder估计
AI.motivation: 研究非散度形式椭圆算子分数幂驱动的非局部Poisson问题，在系数满足最小正则性假设下建立Schauder估计，这是经典椭圆理论向非局部情形的推广
AI.techniques: 引入延拓问题的粘性解新概念，在退化/奇异Monge-Ampère几何中实施Caffarelli摄动方法，证明延拓问题的Schauder估计，进而得到分数非局部方程的估计
AI.main_theorems: 1) 分数非局部方程的尖锐内部Schauder估计；2) 延拓问题的新Hopf引理；3) 内部Harnack不等式；4) Monge-Ampère几何中粘性解的Hölder正则性
AI.significance: 将经典椭圆正则性理论推广到非局部情形，发展了非散度形式分数算子的正则性理论，为研究更一般的非局部方程提供了新工具和方法

title: Fully non-linear elliptic equations on complex manifolds
comment:
Lemmas 3.1 and 3.3 improved. arXiv admin note: text overlap with
  arXiv:2203.04898
summary:
In this paper, we study a broad class of fully nonlinear elliptic equations
on Hermitian manifolds. On one hand, under the optimal structural assumptions
we derive $C^{2,\alpha}$-estimate for solutions of the equations on closed
Hermitian manifolds. On the other hand, we treat the Dirichlet problem. In both
cases, we prove the existence theorems with unbounded condition.

AI.tldr: 在Hermitian流形上研究一类广泛的完全非线性椭圆方程，在最优结构条件下得到了闭Hermitian流形上解的C^{2,\alpha}估计，并处理了Dirichlet问题
AI.motivation: 研究Hermitian流形上完全非线性椭圆方程的正则性理论和存在性问题，这类方程在复几何和偏微分方程理论中具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 完全非线性椭圆方程理论、先验估计方法、Schauder估计、连续性方法、Hermitian几何中的分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在最优结构条件下得到闭Hermitian流形上解的C^{2,\alpha}估计；2. 处理Dirichlet问题并证明无界条件下的存在性定理
AI.significance: 扩展了完全非线性椭圆方程理论到Hermitian流形背景，为复几何中的非线性问题提供了新的分析工具和存在性结果

title: On a 3D Stokes eigenvalue problem under Navier slip-with-friction   boundary conditions and applications to Navier-Stokes equations
summary:
In this paper we consider, by means of a precise spectral analysis, the 3D
Navier-Stokes equations endowed with Navier slip-with-friction boundary
conditions. We study the problem in a very simple geometric situation as the
region between two parallel planes, with periodicity along the two planes. This
setting, which is often used in the theory of boundary layers, requires some
special treatment for what concerns the functional setting and allows us to
characterize in a rather explicit manner eigenvalues and eigenfunctions of the
associated Stokes problem. These, will be then used in order to identify
infinite dimensional classes of data leading to global strong solutions for the
corresponding evolution Navier-Stokes equations.

AI.tldr: 通过精确谱分析研究带Navier滑移-摩擦边界条件的3D Navier-Stokes方程，在平行平面几何中识别出导致全局强解的无限维数据类
AI.motivation: 研究具有Navier滑移-摩擦边界条件的3D Navier-Stokes方程，这种边界条件在边界层理论中常见。在平行平面间的几何设置下，需要特殊的函数空间处理，并能显式刻画相关Stokes问题的特征值和特征函数
AI.techniques: 精确谱分析方法，在平行平面几何中处理Navier滑移-摩擦边界条件，显式刻画Stokes算子的特征值和特征函数，利用这些特征函数构造无限维数据类
AI.main_theorems: 在平行平面几何中显式刻画了带Navier滑移-摩擦边界条件的Stokes算子的特征值和特征函数，并利用这些特征函数识别出无限维的数据类，这些数据能保证相应演化Navier-Stokes方程存在全局强解
AI.significance: 为具有物理相关边界条件的Navier-Stokes方程提供了新的全局存在性结果，特别是在边界层理论中常见的几何设置下，通过谱分析方法获得了显式构造的全局解类

title: Weighted Poincar\'e inequality and Hardy improvements related to some   degenerate elliptic differential operators
summary:
In this paper, we characterize the sharp constant and maximizing functions
for weighted Poincar\'e inequalities. These results lead to refinements of
Hardy's inequality obtained by adding remainder terms involving \(L^p\) norms.
We use techniques that avoid symmetric rearrangement argument, simplifying the
analysis of these inequalities in both Euclidean and non-Euclidean contexts.
Specifically, this method applies to a variety of settings, such as the
Heisenberg group, various Carnot groups and operators expressed as sums of
squares of vector fields. Significant examples include the Heisenberg-Greiner
operator and the Baouendi-Grushin operator.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过避免对称重排论证的技术，刻画了加权Poincaré不等式的尖锐常数和极大化函数，从而改进了Hardy不等式。
AI.motivation: 研究加权Poincaré不等式的尖锐常数和极大化函数，旨在改进Hardy不等式，通过添加涉及L^p范数的余项来获得更精确的不等式估计。
AI.techniques: 避免使用对称重排论证的技术，简化了在欧几里得和非欧几里得背景下不等式的分析，适用于多种算子结构。
AI.main_theorems: 刻画了加权Poincaré不等式的尖锐常数和极大化函数，得到了Hardy不等式的改进版本（添加L^p范数余项），方法适用于Heisenberg群、Carnot群以及向量场平方和算子等非欧几里得结构。
AI.significance: 提供了一种更简洁的分析框架，统一处理欧几里得和非欧几里得背景下的不等式问题，特别适用于Heisenberg-Greiner算子和Baouendi-Grushin算子等重要的非交换几何算子。

title: On multidimensional nonlocal conservation laws with BV kernels
summary:
We establish local-in-time existence and uniqueness results for nonlocal
conservation laws in several space dimensions under weak (that is, Sobolev or
BV) differentiability assumptions on the convolution kernel. In contrast to the
case of a smooth kernel, in general the solution experiences finite-time
blow-up. We provide an explicit example showing that solutions corresponding to
different smooth approximations of the convolution kernel in general converge
to different measures after the blow-up time. This rules out a fairly natural
strategy for extending the notion of solution of the nonlocal conservation law
after the blow-up time.

AI.tldr: 建立了多维非局部守恒律在弱可微性假设下的局部存在唯一性结果，并证明了光滑核近似会导致爆破后解的不同极限，排除了爆破后解的自然延拓策略。
AI.motivation: 研究多维非局部守恒律在弱可微性（Sobolev或BV空间）卷积核假设下的适定性问题。与光滑核情况不同，弱可微核通常导致解的有限时间爆破，需要理解爆破后的解行为。
AI.techniques: 使用Sobolev空间和BV空间理论，局部存在唯一性证明，构造性反例展示不同光滑近似导致不同爆破后极限，排除自然延拓策略。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在弱可微性假设下建立非局部守恒律的局部存在唯一性定理；2. 证明解一般会经历有限时间爆破；3. 构造显式例子显示不同光滑近似收敛到爆破后的不同测度；4. 排除基于光滑近似的爆破后解延拓策略。
AI.significance: 揭示了非局部守恒律在弱正则性下的本质困难，表明爆破后解行为对核的近似方式敏感，为理解非局部方程的奇性形成机制提供了重要洞见，对相关物理模型有理论意义。

title: Growth of Sobolev norms for completely resonant quantum harmonic   oscillators on $\mathbb{R}^2$
summary:
We consider time dependently perturbed quantum harmonic oscillators in
$\mathbb{R}^2$: $$ {\rm i} \partial_t
u=\frac12(-\partial_{x_1}^2-\partial_{x_2}^2 + x_1^2+x_2^2)u +V(t, x, D)u,
\qquad \ x \in \mathbb{R}^2, $$ where $V(t, x, D)$ is a selfadjoint
pseudodifferential operator of degree zero, $2\pi$ periodic in time. We
identify sufficient conditions on the principal symbol of the potential $V(t,
x, D)$ that ensure existence of solutions exhibiting unbounded growth in time
of their positive Sobolev norms and we show that the class of symbols
satisfying such conditions is generic in the Fr\'echet space of classical
$2\pi$- time periodic symbols of order zero. To prove our result we apply the
abstract Theorem of arXiv:2101.09055v1 : the main difficulty is to find a
conjugate operator $A$ for the resonant average of $V(t,x, D)$. We construct
explicitly the symbol of the conjugate operator $A$, called escape function,
combining techniques from microlocal analysis, dynamical systems and contact
topology.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了在时间周期扰动下，二维量子谐振子的某些解的正Sobolev范数会出现无界增长，并且这类扰动在符号空间中具有普遍性。
AI.motivation: 研究二维量子谐振子在时间周期扰动下的长期动力学行为，特别是探索在何种条件下解的正Sobolev范数会出现无界增长（即所谓的"弱湍流"现象）。
AI.techniques: 结合微局部分析、动力系统和接触拓扑技术，构造显式的逃逸函数（共轭算子的符号），并应用抽象的共振平均理论。
AI.main_theorems: 识别了势能主符号的充分条件，确保存在解的正Sobolev范数随时间无界增长；证明了满足这些条件的符号在零阶经典时间周期符号的Fréchet空间中是普遍的。
AI.significance: 为量子谐振子中的弱湍流现象提供了严格数学证明，建立了微局部分析与动力系统理论的深刻联系，对理解量子系统的长期行为有重要意义。

title: A normalized Ricci flow on surfaces with boundary towards the complete   hyperbolic metric
comment:
A few typos are corrected. Careless mistakes in the argument of
  asymptotic behavior of geodesic curvatures are corrected. The short
  Preliminaries is merged into Introduction. Comments are welcome!
summary:
Let $(\overline{M},g_0)$ be a $2$-D compact surface with boundary $\partial
M$ and its interior $M$. We show that for a large class of initial and boundary
data, the initial-boundary value problem of the normalized Ricci flow
$(1.10)-(1.12)$, with prescribed geodesic curvature $\psi$ on $\partial M$, has
a unique solution for all $t>0$, and it converges to the complete hyperbolic
metric locally uniformly in $M$. Here the natural condition that $\psi>0$
causes the main difficulty in the a priori estimates in the corresponding
initial-boundary problem $(1.15)-(1.17)$ of the parabolic equations, for which
an auxiliary Cauchy-Dirichlet problem is introduced. We also provide examples
of the boundary data $\psi$ which fits well with the natural asymptotic
behavior of the geodesic curvature, but the solution to $(1.10)-(1.12)$ fails
to converge to the complete hyperbolic metric.

AI.tldr: 证明了带边界曲率条件的归一化Ricci流初边值问题存在唯一全局解并收敛到双曲度量
AI.motivation: 研究带边界的二维紧致流形上归一化Ricci流的初边值问题，边界条件为规定测地曲率ψ>0，目标是证明解的存在性、唯一性和收敛到双曲度量
AI.techniques: 引入辅助的Cauchy-Dirichlet问题处理ψ>0带来的先验估计困难，使用抛物方程理论，局部一致收敛分析
AI.main_theorems: 对于一大类初边值数据，归一化Ricci流初边值问题存在唯一全局解(t>0)，且在M内部局部一致收敛到完全双曲度量
AI.significance: 扩展了Ricci流理论到带边界的流形，揭示了边界曲率条件对收敛性的影响，提供了边界数据导致收敛失败的例子

title: Linear Instability of the Prandtl Equations via Hypergeometric Functions   and the Harmonic Oscillator
summary:
We establish a deep connection between the Prandtl equations linearised
around a quadratic shear flow, confluent hypergeometric functions of the first
kind, and the Schr\"odinger operator. Our first result concerns an ODE and a
spectral condition derived in [10], associated with unstable quasi-eigenmodes
of the Prandtl equations. We entirely determine the space of solutions in terms
of Kummer's functions. By classifying their asymptotic behaviour, we verify
that the spectral condition has a unique, explicitly determined pair of
eigenvalue and eigenfunction, the latter being expressible as a combination of
elementary functions. Secondly, we prove that any quasi-eigenmode solution of
the linearised Prandtl equations around a quadratic shear flow can be
explicitly determined from algebraic eigenfunctions of the Schr\"odinger
operator with quadratic potential. We show finally that the obtained analytical
formulation of the velocity align with previous numerical simulations in the
literature.

AI.tldr: 建立了Prandtl方程在二次剪切流线性化、合流超几何函数与Schrödinger算子之间的深刻联系
AI.motivation: 研究Prandtl方程在二次剪切流附近的线性化问题，特别是其不稳定准特征模的数学结构，这是流体边界层稳定性理论中的重要问题
AI.techniques: 使用合流超几何函数（Kummer函数）、Schrödinger算子谱理论、渐近分析、代数特征函数方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 完全确定了ODE解空间为Kummer函数；2. 验证了谱条件有唯一显式特征对；3. 证明了准特征模可从Schrödinger算子的代数特征函数显式确定
AI.significance: 为Prandtl方程的稳定性分析提供了精确解析工具，建立了流体力学与量子力学算子理论之间的数学桥梁，验证了数值模拟结果

title: On two properties of positively perturbed discrete Schr\"odinger   operators
summary:
We show that if we start from a symmetric lower semi-bounded Schr\"odinger
operator $\mathcal{H}$ on finitely supported functions on a discrete weighted
graph (satisfying certain conditions), apply the Friedrichs construction to get
a self-adjoint extension $H$, and then perturb $H$ by a non-negative function
$W$, then the resulting form-sum $H\widetilde{+}W$ coincides with the
Friedrichs extension of $\mathcal{H}+W$. Additionally, we consider a
non-negative perturbation of an essentially self-adjoint lower semi-bounded
Schr\"odinger operator $H$ on a discrete weighted graph. We show that, under
certain conditions on the graph and the perturbation, the essential
self-adjointness of $H$ remains stable under the given perturbation.

AI.tldr: 证明了离散加权图上对称下半有界薛定谔算子在弗里德里希斯延拓后，非负扰动下的形式和与直接弗里德里希斯延拓的一致性，以及本质自伴性在特定条件下的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究离散加权图上薛定谔算子的自伴延拓问题，特别关注弗里德里希斯延拓在非负扰动下的行为，以及本质自伴性在扰动下的稳定性问题，这对量子力学和谱理论在离散空间中的应用具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 使用弗里德里希斯延拓方法、形式和(form-sum)技术、图论条件分析、算子理论中的自伴延拓理论，以及下半有界算子的扰动分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 从对称下半有界薛定谔算子通过弗里德里希斯延拓得到自伴算子H，再经非负函数W扰动后的形式和H̃+W等于(ℋ+W)的弗里德里希斯延拓；2. 在特定图条件和扰动条件下，本质自伴的下半有界薛定谔算子的本质自伴性在非负扰动下保持稳定。
AI.significance: 为离散加权图上薛定谔算子的扰动理论提供了重要结果，建立了弗里德里希斯延拓与形式和扰动之间的等价关系，为量子力学在离散空间中的数学基础提供了严格的理论支持，对谱分析和算子理论在组合结构中的应用有重要价值。

title: Nonlinear Fokker-Planck equations as smooth Hilbertian gradient flows
summary:
Under suitable assumptions on $\beta:\mathbb{R}\!\to\!\mathbb{R},
\,D:\mathbb{R}^d\!\to\!\mathbb{R}^d$ and $b:\mathbb{R}^d\!\to\!\mathbb{R}$, the
nonlinear Fokker-Planck equation $u_t-\Delta\beta(u)+{\rm div}(Db(u)u)=0$, in
$(0,\infty)\times\mathbb{R}^d$ where $D=-\nabla\Phi$, can be identified as a
smooth gradient flow $\frac{d^+}{dt}\,u(t)+\nabla E_{u(t)}=0$, $\forall t>0$.
Here, $E:\mathcal{P}^*\cap L^\infty(\mathbb{R}^d)\to\mathbb{R}$ is the energy
function associated to the equation, where $\mathcal{P}^*$ is a certain convex
subset of the space of probability densities. $\mathcal{P}^*$ is invariant
under the flow and $\nabla E_u$ is the gradient of $E$, that is, the tangent
vector field to $\mathcal{P}$ at $u$ defined by $\left<\nabla
E_u,z_u\right>_u={\rm diff}\,E_u\cdot z_u$ for all vector fields $z_u$ on
$\mathcal{P}^*$, where $\left<\cdot,\cdot\right>_u$ is a scalar product on a
suitable tangent space
$\mathcal{T}_u(\mathcal{P}^*)\subset\mathcal{D}'(\mathbb{R}^d)$.

AI.tldr: 该论文将一类非线性Fokker-Planck方程识别为概率密度空间上的光滑梯度流
AI.motivation: 研究非线性Fokker-Planck方程 $u_t-\Delta\beta(u)+{\rm div}(Db(u)u)=0$ 的几何结构，其中 $D=-\nabla\Phi$，旨在揭示其作为概率密度空间上梯度流的内在几何性质
AI.techniques: 使用梯度流理论、概率测度空间的几何结构、切空间构造、能量泛函的变分分析，以及Fokker-Planck方程的几何解释
AI.main_theorems: 在适当条件下，证明该非线性Fokker-Planck方程可表示为光滑梯度流 $\frac{d^+}{dt}\,u(t)+\nabla E_{u(t)}=0$，其中能量泛函 $E$ 定义在概率密度空间 $\mathcal{P}^*\cap L^\infty(\mathbb{R}^d)$ 上，且 $\mathcal{P}^*$ 在流下不变
AI.significance: 为非线性Fokker-Planck方程提供了几何解释框架，将偏微分方程分析与概率测度空间的几何结构联系起来，为研究解的长期行为和稳定性提供了新视角

title: A new graph-directed construction of nonlocal energies on the unit   interval
summary:
We present an analytic construction of nonlocal energies on the unit
interval. The energies are defined using a new graph-directed construction of
discrete energies on dyadic approximations of the interval. When the discrete
jump kernels are comparable to the kernel of the fractional discrete Laplacian,
we prove that the discrete energies Mosco converge and the limiting energy is
equivalent to the fractional Gagliardo seminorm.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种在单位区间上构造非局部能量的解析方法，通过图导向的离散能量构造证明了其Mosco收敛到分数阶Gagliardo半范数。
AI.motivation: 研究非局部能量在单位区间上的构造问题，特别是如何从离散近似出发建立连续的非局部能量理论，这涉及到分数阶拉普拉斯算子和相关变分问题的离散逼近。
AI.techniques: 采用图导向的离散能量构造方法，基于区间的二进逼近，使用Mosco收敛理论证明离散能量到连续能量的收敛性，并与分数阶离散拉普拉斯算子的核进行比较分析。
AI.main_theorems: 当离散跳跃核与分数阶离散拉普拉斯算子的核可比时，证明了离散能量的Mosco收敛性，且极限能量等价于分数阶Gagliardo半范数。
AI.significance: 为非局部变分问题和分数阶偏微分方程的数值分析提供了理论基础，建立了离散逼近与连续非局部能量之间的严格数学联系，对计算数学和变分分析有重要意义。

title: Exact solutions describing very slow layer oscillations in a shadow   reaction-diffusion system
summary:
We show in a rigorous way that a stable internal single-layer stationary
solution is destabilized by the Hopf bifurcation as the time constant exceeds a
certain critical value. Moreover, the exact critical value and the exact period
of oscillatory solutions can be obtained. The exact period indicates that the
oscillation is very slow, i.e., the period is of order $O(e^{C/\varepsilon})$.
We also rigorously prove that Hopf bifurcations from multi-layer stationary
solutions occur. In this case anti-phase horizontal oscillations of layers are
shown by formal calculations. Numerical experiments show that the exact period
agrees with the numerical period of a nearly periodic solution near the Hopf
bifurcation point. Anti-phase (out of phase) horizontal oscillations of layers
are numerically observed.

AI.tldr: 严格证明单层和多层稳态解在时间常数超过临界值时通过Hopf分岔失稳，并精确计算临界值和振荡周期
AI.motivation: 研究反应扩散系统中内部层状结构的稳定性问题，特别是当时间常数变化时，稳态解如何通过Hopf分岔失稳并产生振荡行为
AI.techniques: Hopf分岔理论、渐近分析、特征值分析、形式计算、数值实验验证
AI.main_theorems: 1. 单层稳态解在时间常数超过临界值时通过Hopf分岔失稳；2. 精确计算临界值和振荡周期（周期为O(e^{C/ε})量级）；3. 多层稳态解也发生Hopf分岔，层间呈现反相水平振荡
AI.significance: 为反应扩散系统中模式形成的动力学提供了严格数学基础，揭示了慢振荡机制，对理解生物系统中的节律现象和模式动力学有重要意义

title: Sharp well-posedness and ill-posedness of the stationary   quasi-geostrophic equation
summary:
We consider the stationary problem for the quasi-geostrophic equation on the
whole plane and investigate its well-posedness and ill-posedness. In[Fujii,
Ann. PDE 10, 10 (2024)], it was shown that the two-dimensional stationary
Navier--Stokes equations are ill-posed in the critical Besov spaces $\dot
B_{p,1}^{\frac{2}{p}-1}(\mathbb{R}^2)$ with $1 \leq p \leq 2$. Although the
quasi-geostrophic equation has the same invariant scale structure as the
Navier--Stokes equations, we reveal that the quasi-geostrophic equation is
well-posed in the scaling critical Besov spaces $\dot
B_{p,q}^{\frac{2}{p}-1}(\mathbb{R}^2)$ with $(p,q) \in [1,4) \times [1,\infty]$
or $(p,q)=(4,2)$ due to the better properties of the nonlinear structure of the
quasi-geostrophic equation compared to that of the Navier--Stokes equations.
Moreover, we also prove the optimality for the above range of $(p,q)$ ensuring
the well-posedness in the sense that the stationary quasi-geostrophic equation
is ill-posed for all the other cases.

AI.tldr: 证明了准地转方程在临界Besov空间中的适定性与不适定性，揭示了其非线性结构比Navier-Stokes方程更好的性质
AI.motivation: 研究准地转方程的稳态问题在全平面上的适定性与不适定性，与Navier-Stokes方程在临界Besov空间中的行为进行比较
AI.techniques: 使用临界Besov空间理论、尺度不变性分析、非线性结构比较、适定性与不适定性证明方法
AI.main_theorems: 准地转方程在临界Besov空间$\dot B_{p,q}^{\frac{2}{p}-1}(\mathbb{R}^2)$中，当$(p,q) \in [1,4) \times [1,\infty]$或$(p,q)=(4,2)$时适定，其他情况不适定
AI.significance: 揭示了准地转方程与Navier-Stokes方程在临界空间行为的本质差异，为准地转方程的数学理论提供重要进展

title: Stationary solutions to the critical and super-critical   quasi-geostrophic equation in the scaling critical Sobolev space
summary:
We consider the stationary problem for the quasi-geostrophic equation with
the critical and super-critical dissipation and prove the unique existence of
small solutions for given small external force in the scaling critical Sobolev
spaces framework. Moreover, we also show that the data-to-solution map is
continuous. Since the critical and super-critical case involves the derivative
loss, which affects the class of the continuity of the data-to-solution map, we
reveal that the map is no longer uniform continuous, in contrast to the
sub-critical case, where the Lipschitz continuity holds.

AI.tldr: 证明了准地转方程在临界和超临界耗散情况下小解的存在唯一性及解映射的连续性，但该映射不再一致连续
AI.motivation: 研究准地转方程的稳态问题，特别关注临界和超临界耗散情形，这些情形涉及导数损失，影响解映射的连续性性质
AI.techniques: 使用尺度临界Sobolev空间框架，分析临界和超临界情形下的导数损失问题，对比亚临界情形的Lipschitz连续性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在给定小外力下，临界和超临界耗散情形小解的存在唯一性；解映射是连续的但非一致连续；而亚临界情形解映射具有Lipschitz连续性
AI.significance: 揭示了准地转方程在不同耗散机制下解映射连续性的本质差异，为理解非线性偏微分方程在临界情形下的正则性行为提供了重要理论结果

title: Inertial manifolds via spatial averaging: a control-theoretic   perspective
summary:
We develop a functional-analytical machinery for studying the quadratic
regulator problem arising from spectra perturbations of infinite-dimensional
dynamical systems. In particular, we are interested in applications to inertial
manifolds theory. For certain nonautonomous Hamiltonian systems associated with
such problems, we show the existence and uniform nonoscillation of stable
Lagrangian bundles. This is done within the context of the classical frequency
condition for stationary problems, as well as for nonstationary problems
arising under the conditions of the Spatial Averaging Principle of J.
Mallet-Paret and G.R. Sell.

AI.tldr: 为无限维动力系统的谱扰动二次调节器问题建立了泛函分析框架，并应用于惯性流形理论。
AI.motivation: 研究无限维动力系统中由谱扰动引起的二次调节器问题，特别关注其在惯性流形理论中的应用，旨在建立非自治哈密顿系统中稳定拉格朗日丛的存在性和一致非振荡性。
AI.techniques: 泛函分析方法、谱扰动理论、惯性流形理论、哈密顿系统分析、J. Mallet-Paret和G.R. Sell的空间平均原理条件。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在经典频率条件下，某些非自治哈密顿系统存在一致非振荡的稳定拉格朗日丛；将结果扩展到满足空间平均原理条件的非平稳问题。
AI.significance: 为无限维动力系统的谱扰动问题提供了系统的泛函分析框架，将惯性流形理论与二次调节器问题联系起来，扩展了空间平均原理的应用范围，对控制理论和动力系统理论有重要意义。

title: On stability of one-dimensional Hughes' dynamics with affine costs
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.10039
summary:
We investigate stability issues for the one-dimensional variant of the
celebrated Hughes model for pedestrian evacuation. The cost function is assumed
to be affine, which is a setting where existence of solutions with BV loc in
space regularity, away from the so-called turning curve, was recently
established. We provide a uniqueness result for solutions having the special
property that agents never cross the turning curve (which implies that they are
BV globally). In the same setting, continuous dependence of solutions on the
cost parameter is highlighted. On the other hand, numerical simulations using
the manyparticle approximation of the model, with more general initial
conditions that allow the support of the solutions to intersect the turning
curve, demonstrate the strong sensitivity of the evacuation time to the same
cost parameter; this instability arises from interactions between agents and
the turning curve.

AI.tldr: 针对一维Hughes行人疏散模型的稳定性分析，在仿射成本函数下建立了不跨越转向曲线的解的唯一性和连续依赖性，同时通过数值模拟揭示了疏散时间对成本参数的强敏感性。
AI.motivation: 研究著名的Hughes行人疏散模型在一维情况下的稳定性问题。该模型描述行人根据局部密度选择路径以最小化疏散时间，但解的存在性、唯一性和稳定性尚未完全理解，特别是在转向曲线附近的行为。
AI.techniques: 使用有界变差(BV)函数空间理论分析解的正则性；针对不跨越转向曲线的特殊解建立唯一性证明；通过多粒子近似进行数值模拟；分析解对成本参数的连续依赖性。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在仿射成本函数下，对于不跨越转向曲线的解建立了唯一性结果；2) 证明了此类解对成本参数的连续依赖性；3) 通过数值模拟发现，当解的支撑集与转向曲线相交时，疏散时间对成本参数表现出强敏感性。
AI.significance: 首次为Hughes模型建立了部分稳定性理论，揭示了转向曲线在行人疏散动力学中的关键作用，为理解这类交通流模型的数学性质提供了重要进展，对实际疏散策略设计有潜在指导意义。

title: Artefact Analysis of Multistatic Three-Dimensional SAR Imaging with Two   Linear Trajectories
summary:
In recent years, radar technology has seen much improvement, making
multistatic Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) sensing a realistic possibility, for
example in satellite constellations or unmanned aircraft systems. With such
systems, there then comes the requirement to investigate useful multistatic SAR
geometries. We provide a microlocal analysis of a multistatic data acquisition
geometry for three-dimensional SAR imaging, where the transmitter and receiver
move independently along two straight lines covering a region of interest
(ROI). Using microlocal techniques, we show how the data acquisition geometry
influences whether artefacts are likely to be present in the resultant image
and how they can be avoided. Our main contribution is to provide a time-gating
condition on the data which ensures that artefacts are not present in the ROI.
As an independent verification, we provide several numerical simulations which
follow a time-independent formulation.

AI.tldr: 提出多基地SAR成像的微局部分析框架，通过时间门控条件消除ROI中的伪影
AI.motivation: 随着雷达技术进步，多基地SAR系统（如卫星星座、无人机系统）成为现实，需要研究有效的多基地SAR几何配置，分析数据采集几何对成像质量的影响
AI.techniques: 微局部分析技术，时间门控条件，时间无关公式的数值模拟验证
AI.main_theorems: 主要贡献是提出了数据的时间门控条件，确保感兴趣区域（ROI）中不出现伪影，并通过微局部分析证明了该条件的有效性
AI.significance: 为多基地SAR系统设计提供了理论指导，通过几何配置优化来消除成像伪影，提高三维SAR成像质量，对卫星星座和无人机系统等实际应用有重要价值

title: Linear, decoupled and positivity-preserving staggered mesh schemes for   general dissipative systems with arbitrary energy distributions
summary:
In this paper, we develop a novel staggered mesh (SM) approach for general
nonlinear dissipative systems with arbitrary energy distributions (including
cases with known or unknown energy lower bounds). Based on this framework, we
propose several second-order semi-discrete schemes that maintain linearity,
computational decoupling, and unconditional energy stability. Firstly, for
dissipative systems with known energy lower bounds, we introduce a positive
auxiliary variable $V(t)$ to substitute the total energy functional,
subsequently discretizing it on staggered temporal meshes to ensure that the
energy remains non-increasing regardless of the size of time step. The newly
developed schemes achieve full computational decoupling, maintaining
essentially the same computational expense as conventional implicit-explicit
methods while demonstrating significantly improved accuracy. Furthermore, we
rigorously establish the positivity preservation of the discrete variable
$V^{n+1/2}$ which is a crucial property ensuring numerical stability and
accuracy. Theoretical analysis confirms second-order temporal convergence for
the proposed SM schemes. Secondly, for dissipative systems lacking well-defined
energy lower bounds, we devise an alternative auxiliary variable formulation
and extend the SM framework to maintain unconditional energy stability while
preserving numerical effectiveness and accuracy. Finally, comprehensive
numerical experiments, including benchmark problem simulations, validate the
proposed schemes' efficacy and demonstrate their superior performance
characteristics.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的交错网格方法，用于构造非线性耗散系统的二阶半离散格式，保持线性、计算解耦和无条件能量稳定性。
AI.motivation: 针对具有任意能量分布（包括已知或未知能量下界）的一般非线性耗散系统，传统数值方法在保持能量稳定性和计算效率方面存在挑战，需要发展新的数值框架。
AI.techniques: 交错网格方法、正辅助变量技术、能量泛函替代策略、计算解耦技术、无条件能量稳定性分析、二阶时间收敛性理论证明。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于已知能量下界的系统：构造保持线性、计算解耦、无条件能量稳定的二阶格式；2. 严格证明离散变量V^{n+1/2}的正性保持；3. 理论分析证实二阶时间收敛性；4. 对于未知能量下界的系统：扩展交错网格框架保持无条件能量稳定性。
AI.significance: 为非线性耗散系统提供了统一的数值框架，在保持计算效率（与传统隐显式方法相当）的同时显著提高精度，具有广泛的理论和应用价值，特别是在复杂物理系统的数值模拟中。

title: Energy-variational structure in evolution equations
summary:
We consider different measure-valued solvability concepts from the literature
and show that they could be simplified by using the energy-variational
structure of the underlying system of partial differential equations. In the
considered examples, we prove that a certain class of improved measure-valued
solutions can be equivalently expressed as an energy-variational solution. The
first concept represents the solution as a high-dimensional Young measure,
whether for the second concept, only a scalar auxiliary variable is introduced
and the formulation is relaxed to an energy-variational inequality. We
investigate four examples: the two-phase Navier--Stokes equations, a
quasilinear wave equation, a system stemming from polyconvex elasticity, and
the Ericksen--Leslie equations equipped with the Oseen--Frank energy. The wide
range of examples suggests that this is a recurrent feature in evolution
equations in general.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了改进的测度值解概念可以通过能量变分结构简化为能量变分解，揭示了演化方程中测度值解与能量变分解的等价性。
AI.motivation: 研究背景是偏微分方程中测度值解概念的复杂性，特别是高维Young测度表示的改进测度值解。核心问题是如何简化这些复杂的解概念，利用能量变分结构建立更简洁的数学框架。
AI.techniques: 主要使用能量变分方法，将测度值解重新表述为能量变分不等式，引入标量辅助变量代替高维Young测度，通过能量变分结构简化解的概念。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了改进的测度值解与能量变分解的等价性，具体应用于四个例子：两相Navier-Stokes方程、拟线性波动方程、多凸弹性系统和Ericksen-Leslie方程。
AI.significance: 揭示了演化方程中测度值解与能量变分解之间的普遍联系，为复杂偏微分方程提供了更简洁的解概念框架，具有广泛的理论意义和应用价值。

title: How close is too close for singular mean curvature flows?
summary:
Suppose $(M^i_t)_{t\in [0,T)}$, $i=1,2$, are two mean curvature flows in
$\mathbb{R}^{n+1}$ encountering a multiplicity one compact singularity at time
$T$, in such a manner that for every $k$, the Hausdorff distance between the
two flows, $d_H$, satisfies $d_{H}(M^1_t,M^2_t)/(T-t)^k \rightarrow 0$. We
demonstrate that $M^1_t=M^2_t$ for every $t$. This generalizes a result of
Martin-Hagemayer and Sesum, who proved the case where $M^1_t$ is itself a
self-similarly shrinking flow.

AI.tldr: 证明了两个平均曲率流在奇点处具有任意高阶Hausdorff距离渐近等价性时，它们必定完全相等
AI.motivation: 研究平均曲率流在奇点处的唯一性问题，特别是当两个流在奇点附近以任意高阶渐近等价时，是否意味着它们完全相等
AI.techniques: 使用平均曲率流理论、奇点分析、Hausdorff距离估计、自相似收缩流方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了如果两个平均曲率流在多重数为1的紧致奇点处相遇，且对所有k有d_H(M^1_t,M^2_t)/(T-t)^k→0，则M^1_t=M^2_t对所有t成立
AI.significance: 推广了Martin-Hagemayer和Sesum的结果，为平均曲率流奇点处的唯一性提供了更强的判据，对理解流形的演化行为有重要意义

title: Travelling breather solutions in waveguides for cubic nonlinear Maxwell   equations with retarded material laws
summary:
For Maxwell's equations with nonlinear polarization we prove the existence of
time-periodic breather solutions travelling along slab or cylindrical
waveguides. The solutions are TE-modes which are localized in space directions
orthogonal to the direction of propagation. We assume a magnetically inactive
and electrically nonlinear material law with a linear $\chi^{(1)}$- and a cubic
$\chi^{(3)}$-contribution to the polarization. The $\chi^{(1)}$-contribution
may be retarded in time or instantaneous whereas the $\chi^{(3)}$-contribution
is always assumed to be retarded in time. We consider two different cubic
nonlinearities which provide a variational structure under suitable assumptions
on the retardation kernels. By choosing a sufficiently small propagation speed
along the waveguide the second order formulation of the Maxwell system becomes
essentially elliptic for the $\mathbf{E}$-field so that solutions can be
constructed by the mountain pass theorem. The compactness issues arising in the
variational method are overcome by either the cylindrical geometry itself or by
extra assumptions on the linear and nonlinear parts of the polarization in case
of the slab geometry. Our approach to breather solutions in the presence of
time-retardation is systematic in the sense that we look for general conditions
on the Fourier-coefficients in time of the retardation kernels. Our main
existence result is complemented by concrete examples of coefficient functions
and retardation kernels.

AI.tldr: 证明了非线性极化Maxwell方程在波导结构中存在时间周期呼吸子解
AI.motivation: 研究非线性光学中Maxwell方程在波导结构中的时间周期局部化解（呼吸子），这些解在垂直于传播方向的空间方向上局部化，具有重要的物理意义和应用价值。
AI.techniques: 采用变分方法，利用山径定理构造解；通过选择足够小的传播速度使Maxwell系统二阶形式本质上椭圆化；处理紧性问题时利用圆柱几何或对极化部分施加额外假设。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在板状或圆柱波导中存在TE模式的时间周期呼吸子解，这些解在垂直于传播方向的空间方向上局部化；建立了在时间延迟存在下呼吸子解存在的一般条件。
AI.significance: 为非线性光学中波导结构的时间周期局部化解提供了系统理论框架，处理了时间延迟效应，对光通信、非线性波导器件设计有重要理论指导意义。

title: Dynamics of a coupled nonlocal PDE-ODE system with spatial memory:   well-posedness, stability, and bifurcation analysis
summary:
Nonlocal aggregation-diffusion models, when coupled with a spatial map, can
capture cognitive and memory-based influences on animal movement and
population-level patterns. In this work, we study a one-dimensional
reaction-diffusion-aggregation system in which a population's spatiotemporal
dynamics are tightly linked to a separate, dynamically updating map. Depending
on the local population density, the map amplifies and suppresses certain
landscape regions and contributes to directed movement through a nonlocal
spatial kernel. After establishing the well-posedness of the coupled PDE-ODE
system, we perform a linear stability analysis to identify critical aggregation
strengths. We then perform a rigorous bifurcation analysis to determine the
precise solution behavior at a steady state near these critical thresholds,
deciding whether the bifurcation is sub- or supercritical and the stability of
the emergent branch. Based on our analytical findings, we highlight several
interesting biological consequences. First, we observe that whether the spatial
map functions as attractive or repulsive depends precisely on the map's
relative excitation rate versus adaptory rate: when the excitatory effect is
larger (smaller) than the adaptatory effect, the map is attractive (repulsive).
Second, in the absence of growth dynamics, populations can only form a single
aggregate. Therefore, the presence of intraspecific competition is necessary to
drive multi-peaked aggregations, reflecting higher-frequency spatial patterns.
Finally, we show how subcritical bifurcations can trigger abrupt shifts in
average population abundance, suggesting a tipping-point phenomenon in which
moderate changes in movement parameters can cause a sudden population decline.

AI.tldr: 研究耦合PDE-ODE的非局部聚集-扩散-反应系统，分析空间地图对种群动态的影响及其分岔行为
AI.motivation: 研究非局部聚集-扩散模型与空间地图耦合的系统，旨在理解认知和记忆对动物移动及种群空间格局的影响，探索空间地图如何通过放大/抑制景观区域来引导定向移动
AI.techniques: 建立耦合PDE-ODE系统的适定性，进行线性稳定性分析确定临界聚集强度，执行严格的分岔分析确定稳态解行为，判断分岔的超临界/亚临界性质及分支稳定性
AI.main_theorems: 1) 系统适定性；2) 临界聚集强度的确定；3) 稳态附近精确解行为的严格分岔分析；4) 空间地图吸引/排斥性质与激发率/适应率相对大小的关系；5) 种内竞争对多峰聚集的必要性；6) 亚临界分岔导致种群丰度突变的临界点现象
AI.significance: 为理解认知和记忆在生态空间格局形成中的作用提供数学框架，揭示了空间地图功能与参数关系的精确条件，阐明了种内竞争对复杂空间模式形成的必要性，发现了种群动态中可能存在的临界点现象，对生态保护和种群管理有重要启示

title: Global well-posedness of the Navier-Stokes equations for small initial   data in frequency localized Koch-Tataru's space
summary:
We construct global smooth solutions to the incompressible Navier--Stokes
equations in $\mathbb{R}^3$ for initial data in $L^2$ satisfying some smallness
condition. The high-frequency part is assumed to be small in $BMO^{-1}$, while
the low-frequency part is assumed to be small only in $\dot
B^{-1}_{\infty,\infty}$. Since $BMO^{-1}$ is strictly embedded in $\dot
B^{-1}_{\infty,\infty}$, our assumption is weaker than that of Koch and Tataru
(2001), which we also demonstrate with an example of finite energy
divergence-free initial data. Also, our solutions attain the initial data in
the strong $L^2$ sense, and hence satisfy the energy balance for all time.

AI.tldr: 在三维空间中构造了满足特定小性条件的L^2初值Navier-Stokes方程全局光滑解，放宽了Koch-Tataru条件
AI.motivation: 研究三维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的全局适定性问题，特别是对于有限能量初值。Koch和Tataru（2001）在BMO^{-1}小性条件下证明了全局适定性，但该空间严格嵌入于$\dot B^{-1}_{\infty,\infty}$，因此希望放宽条件，仅要求高频部分在BMO^{-1}小，低频部分在更弱的$\dot B^{-1}_{\infty,\infty}$小。
AI.techniques: 使用Littlewood-Paley分解技术，将解分解为高频和低频部分；利用BMO^{-1}和$\dot B^{-1}_{\infty,\infty}$空间的嵌入关系；构造满足能量平衡的强解；通过反例展示新条件确实比Koch-Tataru条件弱。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于三维Navier-Stokes方程，当初值在L^2中且满足：高频部分在BMO^{-1}小，低频部分在$\dot B^{-1}_{\infty,\infty}$小时，存在全局光滑解；2. 解在强L^2意义下达到初值，因此对所有时间满足能量平衡；3. 构造了有限能量无散初值反例，证明新条件确实弱于Koch-Tataru条件。
AI.significance: 1. 显著改进了Koch-Tataru的全局适定性结果，放宽了初值的小性条件；2. 证明了在更弱的拓扑下仍能保证全局光滑解存在；3. 保持了能量平衡性质，这在物理上具有重要意义；4. 为Navier-Stokes方程全局理论提供了新的理解。
